$comment: Layer C for FREIGHT vs the real GnuCOBOL harness image (COMP-3 value subset). The obligations are exactly the DISPLAY twin's - the IRs differ only in the usage attribute, which no layer reads: the 24.5% charge's ROUNDED half-cent boundary is congruence-solved, and the BULK tier branch's boundary goes through the through-rounding path. The packed storage never enters the symbolic store (bytes surface only at the record boundary, covered byte-exactly by layers A/B through the FILEHEX contract).

legacy.label: COBOL 85 FREIGHT (GnuCOBOL via harness image legacymind/legacy-freight, hex-serializing wrapper)
